policy: Document Vault links should point to official court, government, congressional, archive, or reputable public-interest source pages. Do not republish private addresses, personal phone numbers, private emails, private victim details, or raw contact-book data. If a contact book or address book is discussed, link to a lawful source page or redacted/public exhibit page and explain privacy boundaries.

documents.title: Epstein Files Command Center Document Vault
documents.description: Central route for court filings, official releases, archive pages, exhibit references, deposition records, flight-log references, institutional records, and public reporting connected to Epstein and Maxwell matters.

documents.title: CourtListener / RECAP Epstein Search
documents.description: Searchable public court-record index for Epstein-related dockets, filings, opinions, exhibits, and case movement. Use docket entries and filed PDFs rather than screenshots or social posts.

documents.title: CourtListener / RECAP Maxwell Search
documents.description: Searchable public court-record index for Ghislaine Maxwell-related filings, appeals, docket entries, and exhibit references.

documents.title: FBI Vault: Jeffrey Epstein
documents.description: Official FBI Vault search route for released Epstein-related Bureau files. Use this for released records and file references, not rumor summaries.

documents.title: DOJ / U.S. Attorney Public Releases Search
documents.description: Official DOJ search route for Epstein, Maxwell, prosecutions, appeals, victim notifications, and related public releases.

documents.title: Congress.gov Epstein Search
documents.description: Congressional records search route for Epstein-related letters, hearings, subpoenas, requests, and oversight references.

documents.title: Internet Archive: Epstein Public-Record Search
documents.description: Archive search route for public-record collections, scanned material, and file mirrors. Verify provenance before treating any item as evidence.

documents.title: Epstein Black Book / Address Book Boundary
documents.description: The Command Center may discuss the existence, provenance, and public-record significance of Epstein address-book material, but does not republish private addresses, phone numbers, private emails, or raw contact data. Being listed in an address book is not proof of wrongdoing.

documents.title: Maxwell Trial / Exhibit Search Route
documents.description: Use court dockets, trial exhibit references, appeal filings, and reputable court-record repositories to locate Maxwell trial exhibits and deposition materials. Classify every document before using it.

documents.title: Flight Logs / Travel Records Search Route
documents.description: Flight logs and travel references may show association or travel context, but they do not automatically prove criminal conduct. Use court-filed exhibits and source provenance.
